scripts.check:pricing: tsc src/domain/pricing.ts --outDir node_modules/.cache/kitamo-pricing-check --module commonjs --target es2020 --skipLibCheck && node scripts/check-pricing.js
scripts.check:recipes: tsc src/domain/recipeCosting.ts --outDir node_modules/.cache/kitamo-recipe-check --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --skipLibCheck && node scripts/check-recipe-costing.js
scripts.check:production: tsc src/domain/productionMath.ts --outDir node_modules/.cache/kitamo-production-check --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --skipLibCheck && node scripts/check-production-math.js
scripts.check:cogs: tsc src/domain/orderCogs.ts --outDir node_modules/.cache/kitamo-cogs-check --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --skipLibCheck && node scripts/check-order-cogs.js
scripts.check:fixedcosts: tsc src/domain/fixedCostSchedule.ts src/domain/profitMath.ts --outDir node_modules/.cache/kitamo-fixedcost-check --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --skipLibCheck && node scripts/check-fixed-costs.js
scripts.check:pilot: tsc src/domain/pricing.ts src/domain/recipeCosting.ts src/domain/productionMath.ts src/domain/orderCogs.ts src/domain/fixedCostSchedule.ts src/domain/profitMath.ts --outDir node_modules/.cache/kitamo-pilot-check --module commonjs --target es2020 --strict --skipLibCheck && node scripts/check-pilot-scenario.js
